content.en:
Airplanes!

Ye Tian descended, and with a wave of his hand, he froze all those true dragon insects.

"True dragon bugs!"

He learned the name of the creature through his talent for copying.

There are no such creatures in the Silent Black Sea, these creatures have come from the ruins of the Immeasurable Realm.

Immediately, he wiped out these true dragon insects, leaving only one for research.

......

"A batch of real dragon worms is dead!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor frowned, this was the message that the True Dragon Worm Mother had sent to him.

However, he quickly calmed down, this situation is very common, after all, some Infinite Realms may have hidden the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor, and it can only be said that it is bad luck.

And after Ye Tian killed these true dragon insects, he didn't make any other moves, he just thought that a group of special creatures in the immeasurable ruins had accidentally broken into the Silent Black Sea.

As the years passed, more and more true dragon insects devoured living beings and fed back energy for the true dragon insect mother.

This makes the true dragon insect mother grow faster and stronger.

On this day, this True Dragon Worm Mother finally advanced to the fifth stage of the Boundary Breaking Level.

Subsequently, the True Dragon Worm Mother began to give birth to more and more powerful True Dragon Worms, and sped up devouring many Infinite Realm creatures, and even began to invade some realms, looking for some Fifth Stage Great Ancestors to devour.

After all, if it didn't devour the powerful high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the growth rate of the True Dragon Worm Mother would be very slow, and it would be impossible for her to grow to the Heavenly Ancestor level at all.

Although doing so will be completely exposed, he can't care about being exposed, as long as the True Dragon Worm Mother grows to the Heavenly Ancestor, even if he is found, he is not afraid of those Heavenly Ancestors.

this day.

A group of True Dragonworms has invaded a territory.

This realm is not very powerful, there are only two fifth-stage great ancestors, and no Heavenly Ancestor has been born.

After the invasion of the True Dragon Worm, these two Fifth Stage Great Ancestors tried to escape.

However, they couldn't escape at all, and were directly besieged by a group of fifth-stage true dragon insects, killed instantly, turned into their rations, and became the energy to feed back the true dragon insects.

It didn't take long for the realm to be swallowed up, and there was no life left.

And this scene has already been summoned out, after all, the two fifth-stage great ancestors can also contact the outside world, and they have been summoned away long before they die.

Not long after, some fifth-stage great ancestors came to this realm to investigate the situation, and when they saw that a realm was swallowed up, as if it was dead silence, they immediately realized that something was wrong and immediately reported it.

this day.

A Heavenly Ancestor came here, looked at this dead and silent realm, and his face suddenly turned sideways.

"This is the breath of the true dragon worm!!!"

He immediately realized that this matter could not be solved by himself, so he went to Falcon Dragon City as soon as possible.

Hayabusa Dragon City has a high status and is one of the strongest forces in the many realms in this area.

And since Dongao Tianzu broke through, he has become an existence that surpasses ordinary Tianzu, so this Tianzu wants to come to Dongao Tianzu to report information.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor originally didn't want to pay attention to this arriving Heavenly Ancestor, but after mentioning the True Dragon Worm, the Heavenly Ancestors of the entire Falcon Dragon City were terrified.

Therefore, Dongao Tianzu was also alarmed.

"True Dragonworm !!!"

Dongao Tianzu's face changed.

As far as he knew, the True Dragon Worm came from the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and this creature was conceived by the True Dragon Worm Mother, and it needed to devour a large number of living beings to grow.

And there were no ordinary creatures in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm, so it was difficult for the True Dragon Insect Mother to grow to the Heavenly Ancestor level and be killed by these Heavenly Ancestors.

And a long time ago, the True Dragon Realm Ruins really gave birth to a Heavenly Ancestor-level True Dragon Worm Mother, and some Heavenly Ancestors were devoured by the True Dragon Worm Mother.

Later, an incomparably powerful Heavenly Ancestor descended on the True Dragon Realm Ruins and joined forces with other Heavenly Ancestors to besiege the True Dragon Insect Mother, which solved the crisis.

And in an even more distant era, there was also a Heavenly Ancestor who brought out the True Dragon Insect Mother from the True Dragon Realm Ruins, and then controlled the cultivation of the True Dragon Insect Mother.

In those years, many Heavenly Ancestors fell, and I don't know how many realms were destroyed.

Since then, the True Dragon Worm Mother has been a taboo, and it is absolutely not allowed to be brought out of the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

But now, the True Dragon Worm has appeared, and it is obvious that a Heavenly Ancestor has brought out the True Dragon Worm Mother from the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

And in the last few years, only a few Heavenly Ancestors have come out.

"It's not easy to cultivate a true dragon worm mother, you need some special resources, otherwise you can't breed it. And the true dragon insect mother that has grown up can't be controlled, and there is no point in bringing it out. "

Dongao Tianzu thought about it carefully and thought of the true dragon sudo.

The True Dragon Suji Vine helps the True Dragon Worm Mother Worm to conceive eggs, and the last time the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor and the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor carved up the True Dragon Suji Vine.

"Could it be the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor?"

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor thought so, and took a group of Heavenly Ancestors to the Xuanqi Territory.

Genki Territory.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor and the other Heavenly Ancestors descended here, immediately alarming Ye Tian, Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, and the three Heavenly Ancestors of Taichen Palace.

After all, there was no cover for the arrival of Dongao Tianzu.

"I've seen Dongao Heavenly Ancestor!"

Taichen Heavenly Ancestor said respectfully.

"I'm here to find the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor!" Dongao Heavenly Ancestor explained his intention.

Airplanes!

When the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor appeared, he looked a little frightened, and he didn't know what happened when Dongao Heavenly Ancestor came to find him?

It's still the same thing as the real dragon Sudo last time, but it's not like that!

Rumble!!!

The aura of the Dongao Heavenly Ancestor crushed and enveloped the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

"Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, did you bring out the True Dragon Worm Mother from the True Dragon Realm Ruins?" asked Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

The Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor looked confused: "True Dragon Worm Mother, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor, where did I bring out this thing, I haven't seen the True Dragon Worm Mother!"

"What about the True Dragon Sudo you obtained last time, is it still there?" asked Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

"Used some, some left!"

Immediately, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor took out the remaining piece of True Dragon Sue Vine.

However, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor couldn't be sure if it was the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor who did it, so he said: "Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, you follow me first, and you must not leave until you are sure that this matter has nothing to do with you." "

Although the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor was not happy, he didn't dare to refute it, so he could only nod in agreement.

Immediately, Dongao Heavenly Ancestor went to find Wutong Heavenly Ancestor and the other three Heavenly Ancestors who also got the True Dragon Sudo.

The other two Heavenly Ancestors have all found it, and they haven't used the True Dragon Sudo yet.

Only Wutong Heavenly Ancestor couldn't find it, saying that he went to a dangerous place to find resources, but this possibility is not very likely.

Thus.

Dongao Heavenly Ancestor suspected that the True Dragon Insect Mother was brought out by Wutong Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course.

The three of them were also suspected, so they couldn't be allowed to leave, they were all imprisoned in Falcon Dragon City, and they were not allowed to leave Falcon Dragon City for half a step.

And the matter of the True Dragon Worm Mother also spread all over the world, and all the Heavenly Ancestors and the Fifth Stage Great Ancestors knew about it.
